title: The Invisible Architects: Understanding Habit Formation

questions.sentence: Habit's are the invisible architects of our lives silently shaping our days decisions and destinies
At its core habit formation is a neurological process where our brains create shortcuts to automate frequent actions
The cue is the trigger that tells your brain to go into automatic mode and which habit to use
The routine is the behavior itself the physical mental or emotional action you take
Finally the reward is the positive outcome your brain craves which reinforces the habit loop
To effectively build new positive habits one must intentionally design this loop
